## What are you adding?

<!-- Link(s) and a one-line reason each resource belongs on the list. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] The resource is genuinely awesome and actively maintained.
- [ ] Added to the most relevant section, in alphabetical order.
- [ ] Entry follows the format: `- [Name](url) - Description ending with a period.`
- [ ] Description does not start with "A", "An", or "The".
- [ ] No duplicate of an existing entry.
- [ ] Link is the canonical homepage/repository (no affiliate or tracking URLs).
